title: Don't use Fable 5 in Claude… do this instead
summary: David Ondrej advises against using Fable 5 in Claude, suggesting an alternative approach instead. The video promotes learning AI coding and references AutoGit as a related tool.
writeup: This video argues against using Fable 5, a testing framework, inside Claude for AI-assisted coding, and presents an alternative workflow instead. It situates the discussion in test-driven development, where tests guide how code gets written and validated. The takeaway is a recommendation to route Fable 5's testing capabilities through a different setup rather than relying on it within Claude.
